patch.value: pm-web-l5ko
Spec new package pm-metrics for project health telemetry

Define a standalone pm-metrics package that aggregates velocity, lead/cycle time, WIP, blocker aging, and completion throughput from pm workspaces into agent-friendly structured outputs (JSON + compact summaries).
Plan
open
codex-5-3
Spec documents command surface, metric definitions/formulas, input/output contracts, drift/quality checks, privacy constraints, and release/test plan with at least one worked example dataset.
Give agents a deterministic health snapshot so planning decisions are grounded in measurable delivery signals.
A plan-ready blueprint that can move directly into implementation tasks without re-discovery.

## Proposed command surface
- `pm metrics summary [--window 30d] [--json]`
- `pm metrics trend --metric cycle_time --bucket week --json`
- `pm metrics blockers --aging-over 3d --json`

## Core data contract
- Inputs: pm item front-matter + history timestamps + dependency graph.
- Outputs: deterministic JSON schema (`metrics`, `window`, `sample_size`, `quality_flags`).
- Include confidence flags when sample size is too small.

## MVP milestones
1) definitions + schema
2) summary command
3) trend command
4) docs + fixtures + release hardening
closed
Documented command surface, data contracts, MVP milestones, and quality constraints for implementation handoff.
Each new package has an implementation-ready plan item with concrete acceptance criteria and design details.
Spec body and acceptance criteria completed with command proposals, data model expectations, and milestone breakdown.
Phase 6 package spec drafted and acceptance criteria defined.
